title: doordash
description:
basically you have a block that you can order stuff from
*note that the mod is still beta and a lot of features does not exist right no*
body:
**a mod that adds a block, from that block you can buy stuff.
Introducing the DoorDash mod for Minecraft, a convenient way to bring the marketplace to your virtual world! With this mod, players can now purchase items directly from a special block within their Minecraft world, adding a new layer of realism and functionality to the game.**

## | all possible purchases:

| 16x iron - gold

| 32x steakes - emerald

| 64x dirt - iron

| 1x villager spawn egg - diamond

## | features:

### | 1.
Shop Block: Craft or find the Shop Block in your world to access the virtual marketplace.

### | 2.
User-Friendly Interface: Interact with the block to browse through available items and make purchases.

## | How to Use:

### 1.
Craft or locate the DoorDash block in your Minecraft world using this crafting recipe![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21d2afc6891c210c13966adcd4ffa185957a7b82.png)

### | 2.
Interact with the block to open the shop interface.

### | 3.
Browse through the available items and their prices.

### | 4.
Use your in-game currency or resources to make purchases.

### |  5.
Enjoy the convenience of shopping without leaving your Minecraft world!
